text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After discovering that her team was secretly
doing extra training without permission, Ms.
Kashimoto mercilessly scolds Team Zenith.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although she can be harsh and overbearing, Ms.
Kashimoto clearly cares about her team. When we
ask Director Akikawa why Ms. Kashimoto is so
strict, she tells us everything.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ms. Kashimoto was once a trainer who valued the
freedom of Umamusume. However, her trainee
was forced to retire from racing after she
overworked herself by doing too much solo
training and got injured in a race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ever since, Ms. Kashimoto has been adamant
about micromanaging her racers, all in order to
protect them from suffering the same fate.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The tragedy took place at the Unity Cup, which is
why the competition is especially traumatic for
Ms. Kashimoto.
